message:
feat(mermaid): add gitGraph, journey, requirementDiagram parsers

Add three new Mermaid diagram type parsers with full IR normalization:

- gitGraph: commit, branch, checkout, merge, cherry-pick statements
- journey: section and task (title, score, actors) statements
- requirementDiagram: requirement/element definitions, relations

Changes:
- DiagramType enum: +GitGraph, +Journey, +Requirement variants
- Statement enum: +11 new variants for the three diagram types
- MermaidCompatibilityMatrix: +3 fields (gitgraph, journey, requirement)
- parse_header(): recognizes gitGraph, journey, requirementDiagram headers
- parse_with_diagnostics(): dispatches to per-type parsers
- normalize_ast_to_ir(): converts new statements to IR nodes/edges/clusters
- FEATURE_MATRIX: +4 entries for new diagram type coverage
- 14 new unit tests covering parsing and IR normalization

Beads: bd-hudcn.1.7.1, bd-hudcn.1.8.1, bd-hudcn.1.9.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
